description_long: This is a low-cut athletic shoe featuring a bold geometric pattern of black and white triangles across its synthetic upper. Three bright orange stripes, characteristic of Adidas branding, run along the lateral side, while additional orange accents appear on the tongue and toe area. The shoe has a white lace-up closure with standard eyelets and a padded collar for comfort. The interior appears to be lined with a dark, likely soft material, and the heel counter is reinforced for stability. The outsole is flat and designed for indoor or turf use, with a subtle tread pattern for grip. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for sports or casual urban wear.
description: A low-cut Adidas athletic shoe with a striking black and white geometric pattern and orange accents, featuring a lace-up closure and flat sole.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the rounded toe, lace-up closure, and the geometric pattern extending over the toe box.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three orange Adidas stripes and the full extent of the black and white pattern.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the padded heel collar, size marking, and reinforced heel counter.
description_view_3: Top-rear view emphasizing the shoe's interior lining, collar padding, and the lateral orange stripes.
attribute_logo: Orange Adidas logo on the tongue, three orange stripes on the lateral side
